color_intro.name: Title
color_intro.characters: The SoloOctopus palette is built on a nocturnal canvas. Near-black is the foundation, electric teal is the signal of distributed intelligence. White provides clarity and contrast, ensuring the brand reads with confidence across digital touchpoints, decks, and podcast art.

longform_body.name: Title
longform_body.characters: The SoloOctopus palette is built on a nocturnal canvas. Near-black is the foundation, electric teal is the signal of distributed intelligence. White provides clarity and contrast, ensuring the brand reads with confidence across digital touchpoints, decks, and podcast art.
